content:
The scene shifts between Arjun's past and present. In the past, Arjun meets Anjali at a playground, and they become close friends. Anjali makes sure Arjun feels included in the group, and they share a special bond. 

As the story progresses, Anjali's family prepares to move to America, and she has to leave Arjun behind. Arjun experiences his first heartbreak when Anjali leaves.

In the present, Arjun is on his building terrace with Koushik, discussing his childhood crush on Anjali. Koushik advises Arjun to accept his feelings and move on.

The scene then shifts to the night when Arjun is waiting for Anjali to arrive, dressed in his best attire with a bouquet of flowers.
